body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. Title is imperative and names subsystem+change. Description has PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with 7 specific file:line citations, PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC is numbered 1–9 with three named test functions (AC 3–5, e.g. TestReadinessUnavailableOutputIsActionable), a scoped go test invocation with -run filter (AC 8), and a lefthook gate (AC 9). Labels carry phase, area, kind, and two cross-refs (adr:023, spec:FEAT-010). Parent and one dep are explicit. Description is self-contained with no /tmp/ or chat references. Minor: AC 7 uses an 'if affected' qualifier that reduces verifiability for autonomous execution, but does not block drain.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["AC 7: Replace 'refreshed if affected' with a concrete deterministic check, e.g., 'grep -r \"pre-claim\\|complexity gate\\|pre-dispatch lint\" docs/ website/ returns zero non-legacy hits, or confirm no docs were affected and note it in the PR description'."],"waivers_applied":[]}
